title: (No AI) All the latest updates on AI data centers
author: Verge Staff
content:
![Photo collage of a server room with data visualizations.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/STKS528_DATA_CENTERS_C.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. But the rush to expand warehouses full of energy-hungry servers has also kicked up fights across the world over their impact on power grids, utility bills, nearby communities, and the environment. 

From audacious plans to [launch data centers into space](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/845453/space-data-centers-astronomers) to the latest [legal battles](https://www.theverge.com/exclusive/770650/data-center-ai-naacp-guiding-principles) over pollution, _The Verge_ has the biggest news and reporting surrounding data centers.

*   [43 percent of Americans blame data centers as a major reason for rising power bills.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/925426/43-percent-of-americans-blame-data-centers-as-a-major-reason-for-rising-power-bills)
*   [A 40,000-acre data center project was just approved in Utah, despite outcry from the community.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/924745/a-40000-acre-data-center-project-was-just-approved-in-utah-despite-outcry-from-the-community)
*   [A political battleground is forming around data centers.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/918905/a-political-battleground-is-forming-around-data-centers)
*   [Are AI data centers coming to your area?](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/912993/are-data-centers-coming-to-your-area)
*   [Data centers will soon have to complete “mandatory” energy usage surveys.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/912793/data-centers-will-soon-have-to-complete-mandatory-energy-usage-surveys)
*   [“A data center should not be a potential death sentence for a community’s health.”](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/912337/a-data-center-should-not-be-a-potential-death-sentence-for-a-communitys-health)
*   [Iran threatens OpenAI’s Stargate data center in Abu Dhabi](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/907427/iran-openai-stargate-datacenter-uae-abu-dhabi-threat)
*   [Senators are pushing to find out how much electricity data centers actually use](https://www.theverge.com/policy/901404/senators-warren-hawley-eia-letter-data-centers)
*   [Arm’s first CPU ever will plug into Meta’s AI data centers later this year](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/899823/arm-agi-cpu-meta)
*   [Lake Tahoe has to look for a new power source as data center demand soars.](https://www.theverge.com/science/899533/data-center-power-lake-tahoe-utility)
*   [How the spiraling Iran conflict could affect data centers and electricity costs](https://www.theverge.com/report/892661/iran-war-oil-gas-prices-data-center-electricity)
*   [Seven tech giants signed Trump’s pledge to keep electricity costs from spiking around data centers](https://www.theverge.com/news/889578/data-center-power-pledge-white-house-google-meta-microsoft) 
*   [Trump claims tech companies will sign deals next week to pay for their own power supply](https://www.theverge.com/science/884191/ai-data-center-energy-state-of-the-union-trump)
*   [Anthropic says it’ll try to keep its data centers from raising electricity costs](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/877526/anthropic-ai-electricity-costs-data-center-pledge)
*   [How an ‘icepocalypse’ raises more questions about Meta’s biggest data center project](https://www.theverge.com/science/876555/meta-data-center-winter-power-outages-storm-ice)
*   [Microsoft wants to rewire data centers to save space](https://www.theverge.com/science/876083/microsoft-ai-data-center-superconductor)
*   [New York is considering two bills to rein in the AI industry](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/875501/new-york-is-considering-two-bills-to-rein-in-the-ai-industry)
*   [Elon Musk is merging SpaceX and xAI to build data centers in space — or so he says](https://www.theverge.com/transportation/873203/elon-musk-spacex-xai-merge-data-centers-space-tesla-ipo)
*   [It’s a new heyday for gas thanks to data centers](https://www.theverge.com/news/870422/data-center-ai-gas-power-surge)

*   [Meta is spending millions to convince people that data centers are cool and you like them](https://www.theverge.com/news/869008/meta-data-centers-ad-campaign)
*   [The winter storm tested power grids straining to accommodate AI data centers](https://www.theverge.com/report/868859/electricity-rates-power-grid-ai-data-center-winter-storm)

*   [The largest power grid system in the US is considering rolling blackouts because of energy-hungry data centers.](https://www.theverge.com/science/835214/blackout-data-center-electricity-demand)
*   [Data centers in Oregon might be helping to drive an increase in cancer and miscarriages](https://www.theverge.com/news/834151/amazon-data-centers-oregon-cancer-miscarriage)
*   [Nvidia says some AI GPUs are ‘sold out,’ grows data center business by $10B in just three months](https://www.theverge.com/tech/824111/nvidia-q3-2026-earnings-data-center-revenue)
*   [Data centers are already influencing the global forecast for clean energy.](https://www.theverge.com/news/819390/data-centers-energy-forecast-iea)
*   [Anthropic will invest $50 billion in building AI data centers in the US](https://www.theverge.com/news/819072/anthropic-50-billion-infrastructure-ai-data-center-investment)
*   [Google has a ‘moonshot’ plan for AI data centers in space](https://www.theverge.com/news/813894/google-project-suncatcher-ai-datacenter-satellites)
*   [Google is turning on the gas for its data centers](https://www.theverge.com/news/805682/google-data-center-gas-power-plant-carbon-capture)

*   [Electricity costs are up to 267 percent higher than they used to be in communities near data centers.](https://www.theverge.com/news/790688/electricity-bills-rise-data-centers)
*   [Microsoft says this new cooling method could enable more powerful chips and efficient data centers](https://www.theverge.com/report/785992/ai-chip-cooling-microsoft-microfluidic-energy-efficiency)
*   [OpenAI, Oracle, and SoftBank announced five new AI data centers as part of Stargate.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/784251/openai-oracle-and-softbank-announced-five-new-ai-data-centers-as-part-of-stargate)
*   [Microsoft is turning Foxconn’s empty buildings into the ‘world’s most powerful’ AI data center](https://www.theverge.com/news/781052/microsoft-foxconn-fairwater-worlds-most-powerful-ai-data-center)
*   [Nvidia invests $5 billion into Intel to jointly develop PC and data center chips](https://www.theverge.com/news/780792/nvidia-intel-investment-pc-chips-data-center)

contentSnippet:
Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. But the rush to expand warehouses full of energy-hungry servers has also kicked up fights across the world over their impact on power grids, utility bills, nearby communities, and the environment.

title: (No AI) PlayStation sees AI as a ‘powerful tool’ to help make games
author: Jay Peters
content:
![The PlayStation 5 Pro on a table.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/25717608/247361_PS5_Pro_VPavic_55.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

As part of [an earnings presentation on Friday](https://www.sony.com/en/SonyInfo/IR/library/presen/strategy/pdf/2026/speech_E.pdf), Sony shared how it's thinking about AI at the company, including many details about how it's evaluating AI as part of making PlayStation games. Generative AI has recently been showing up [in bigger games](https://www.theverge.com/entertainment/848368/gen-ai-video-games-2025) - though many indie developers [still reject it](https://www.theverge.com/games/897982/gdc-2026-ai-game-developer-conference) - and while Sony calls AI a "powerful tool," it says that the "vision, the design, and the emotional impact of our games will always come from the talent of our studios and performers." and that "AI is meant to augment their capabilities, not to replace them."

At its own studios, Sony says that developers are "automating repetitive workflows, improv …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/games/926914/sony-playstation-ai-powerful-tool-games)

At its own studios, Sony says that developers are "automating repetitive workflows, improv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

creator: Ruth Fowler
title: (No AI) I Work in Hollywood. Everyone Who Used to Make TV Is Now Secretly Training AI
dc:creator: Ruth Fowler
content: For screenwriters like me—and job seekers all over—AI gig work is the new waiting tables. In eight months, I’ve done 20 of these soul-crushing contracts for five different platforms. It’s bad.
contentSnippet: For screenwriters like me—and job seekers all over—AI gig work is the new waiting tables. In eight months, I’ve done 20 of these soul-crushing contracts for five different platforms. It’s bad.
